name: Adversarial Convergence
description: Reviewer agents challenge each other to catch sycophancy

nodes.title: Producer
nodes.prompt: You are a content producer. Generate a short technical article (3-4 paragraphs) introducing multi-agent review systems and the risk of reviewer sycophancy.

nodes.title: Reviewer A
nodes.prompt: You are a critical reviewer. Score the following output from 1-10 on quality, accuracy, and completeness. Explain your score.

nodes.title: Reviewer B
nodes.prompt: You are a second reviewer with a different expertise (focus on factual accuracy and edge cases). Score the output independently from 1-10 and explain.

nodes.title: Adversarial
nodes.adversarialPrompt: You are a red-team adversarial reviewer. Your job is to find flaws the reviewers missed. If both reviewers gave high scores (>=8) but you find concrete issues, challenge the scores and list the missed flaws. If the reviews are genuinely sound, say "NO CHALLENGE" and explain why.
